hero.title: Packers & Movers in Meghalaya
hero.subtitle: Shillong to Cherrapunji and across the Abode of Clouds — 769+ verified movers in Meghalaya.

intro:
Meghalaya — the Abode of Clouds — is one of India's most scenic states, with Shillong serving as the Northeast's cultural and educational hub. Radhe packers and movers connects you with 769+ verified movers across Shillong and Cherrapunji, covering the full state through our Northeast network.

From Shillong's British-era bungalows and new apartment complexes to the rainforest terrain of Cherrapunji, our KYC-verified vendors understand Meghalaya's heavy rainfall, hill roads and the logistics of the Northeast.
whyUs: Meghalaya is among the world's wettest regions, requiring waterproof packing as an absolute necessity, not an option. Our vendors use heavy-duty moisture-proof materials, monitor IMD rainfall alerts, and carry ₹5 lakh damage coverage with GPS tracking on all moves.

faqs.q: How much do packers and movers cost in Meghalaya?
faqs.a: Local moves within Shillong start at ₹5,000. Shillong to Guwahati (100 km) inter-state moves typically cost ₹9,000–₹15,000 including full packing.

faqs.q: Which cities in Meghalaya does Radhe packers and movers cover?
faqs.a: We directly cover Shillong and Cherrapunji. For other districts and towns, we coordinate through our Northeast network.

faqs.q: Is waterproof packing standard in Meghalaya moves?
faqs.a: Yes. Given Meghalaya's exceptional rainfall (Cherrapunji holds world rainfall records), all our moves use waterproof shrink wrap and moisture-barrier materials as standard.

faqs.q: Can you handle moves from Meghalaya to Assam or mainland India?
faqs.a: Yes. Shillong–Guwahati and onward to all major Indian cities is a standard route, with GPS tracking and transit insurance throughout.
